expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with at least 5 user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Task Statuses",
  "branchName": "task-statuses",
  "description": "Add task statuses with schema, backend, and UI support",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add status column to tasks table with default 'pending'",
      "description": "As a user, I want each task to have a status so that work state is tracked.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": ["Add non-null status column with default 'pending'", "Migration applied without data loss", "Typecheck passes"],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["db/migrations/", "src/models/task.ts"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add backend action to update task status",
      "description": "As a user, I want to change a task's status so that the system records progress.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": ["Add API or server action to update status", "Validation for allowed status values (pending,in_progress,done)", "Tests pass", "Typecheck passes"],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/services/taskService.ts", "src/routes/tasks.ts"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Show status badge on task cards",
      "description": "As a user, I want to see a badge on each task card showing current status so I can scan progress.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": ["Badge displays pending/in_progress/done", "Badge color differs by status", "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill", "Typecheck passes"],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/components/TaskCard.tsx", "src/styles/task.css"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add status control to task rows for inline edits",
      "description": "As a user, I want a control in task row to change status so I can update quickly from list.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": ["Inline control updates status via backend action", "Optimistic UI or loading indicator", "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill", "Typecheck passes"],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/components/TaskRow.tsx", "src/hooks/useTaskActions.ts"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add status filter to task list",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter the task list by status so I can focus on specific work state.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": ["Filter options: All, Pending, In Progress, Done", "Filter persists per session or via query params", "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill", "Typecheck passes"],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/pages/TaskList.tsx", "src/components/StatusFilter.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover schema, backend status updates, badge display, status controls, and filtering.
